theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A premium analytics dashboard requires authority, clarity, and precision. A high-contrast light theme with stark borders, reduced text sizing, and rigorous typographic hierarchy feels high-end and functional.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section titles, KPI values, and tab names. Ensure tracking is tight (`tracking-tight`).

body.usage: Use for body text, data tables, subtitles, and labels.

kpi_cards.label: text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500
kpi_cards.subtitle: text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1
kpi_cards.trend: text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1 mt-2

charts.description: Use a sophisticated monochromatic slate/obsidian palette for premium data visualization, replacing the default rainbow colors. Use highlight colors sparsely to draw attention to specific data points.

layout_and_spacing.gaps: Tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6) for widget density

kpi_cards.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200/80 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-200 group
kpi_cards.icon_treatment: Remove heavy gradients behind icons. Use subtle off-white squares (`bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100`) with sleek slate icons (`text-slate-700`).

charts_and_tables.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200/80 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden

header_icon.classes: h-10 w-10 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white

kpi_card: Change title to overline style: `text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500`.
Reduce value font size from `text-3xl font-bold` to `text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900`.

Remove heavy color gradients from the icon background (`bg-gradient-to-br from-...`). Use a minimalist square icon wrapper with `bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 text-slate-700 h-10 w-10 rounded-lg`.
Add a subtle group hover effect on the card to slightly lift it (`hover:-translate-y-0.5`).
header: Remove violet gradient from the header icon (`bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500...`). Use `bg-slate-900 text-white`.
Ensure title uses the heading font (`font-family: Manrope`, `tracking-tight`).
tabs: Update TabsList to look sharper, utilizing `bg-slate-100/50` for the track and crisp white active states with subtle shadows.
charts: Change default colored CartesianGrid lines to very subtle dashed lines (`stroke='#F1F5F9' strokeDasharray='3 3'`).
Use CustomTooltip with a clean, sharp background (`bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-xl rounded-lg p-3`) and sharp text.
Replace rainbow pie/bar chart colors with a sophisticated monochromatic palette (e.g., Slate 900, 700, 500, etc.).
For the Area chart (Daily Active Users), use a sleek dark gradient or a sharp `#0F172A` stroke with a subtle opacity fill.
tables: Table header text should be slightly smaller and tracked out: `text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-slate-500`.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements (cards, buttons) should have subtle transform/lifts (`-translate-y-[1px]`) and smooth transitions (`transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out`).
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Primary buttons should be stark black (`bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white`). Filter selects and secondary buttons should be crisp outlines (`border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Update frontend/src/pages/UserStatisticsPage.js to implement these guidelines.
Add font imports for 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to `index.css` or the page wrapper, and apply them using custom Tailwind classes or style props.
Rewrite the `KpiCard` component inside the file to match the `components_modifications.kpi_card` rules.
Refactor the `CHART_COLORS` array to use the premium monochromatic slate palette defined in `colors.charts.palette`.
Update Recharts components (Tooltip, CartesianGrid, Area, Bar, Pie, Line) to use the new colors, clean tooltips, and sharp lines.
Update the page header to remove the violet gradient and apply a premium stark look.
Ensure the `KpiCard` uses `data-testid` attributes on its outer container and key elements for testing robustness.
Ensure Tab elements and Filter Selects have the specified premium crisp look.
